## Summary

- What problem does this change solve?
- What changed in the product or framework behavior?

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `python -m mkdocs build --strict`
- [ ] `python -m build`

## Docs And Examples

- [ ] I updated component docs if the public API changed
- [ ] I updated examples if runtime behavior changed
- [ ] I updated root markdown files if install, release, or support guidance changed
